mapper.select: select id, username, name, password, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from employee where username=#{username}
mapper.insert: insert into employee( id, username, name, password, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user ) VALUES( #{id}, #{username}, #{name}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
